primary.name: charcoal
primary.source: discovery: background role, count 21, contexts: navigation+container; confirmed by all screenshots

secondary.name: dark-gray
secondary.source: discovery: background role, count 18, context: container; confirmed by contact form screenshot

text.name: silver
text.source: discovery: text role, count 66; confirmed in screenshots as paragraph/secondary text

text_strong.name: off-white
text_strong.role: Headings and primary text on dark backgrounds
text_strong.source: discovery: text role, count 78 + heading role, count 24; confirmed in all screenshots as heading color

text_light.name: off-white
text_light.role: Text on dark backgrounds (same as strong — dark-themed site)

link.name: silver
link.source: discovery: link role, count 48; screenshots show light gray links, #0000ee is default/unstyled

notes.theme: Dark monochromatic design. Nearly all sections use dark backgrounds (#1b1b1d or #3b3b3d) with light text. No bold accent colors — buttons are outline/bordered style with white text. The #0000ee blue in discovery data is an unoverridden browser default, not a design choice — screenshots show no blue elements.
